mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books(isbn, title, author, publisher, year, total, available, status, location, cover, `desc`, clcNumber, physicalDesc, language, country, categoryId, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{isbn}, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{year}, #{total}, #{available}, #{status}, #{location}, #{cover}, #{desc}, #{clcNumber}, #{physicalDesc}, #{language}, #{country}, #{categoryId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE books SET total=#{total}, available=#{available} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE books SET available = available - 1 WHERE id=#{id} AND available > 0
UPDATE books SET available = available + 1 WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE books SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM books ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT language FROM books WHERE language IS NOT NULL ORDER BY language
SELECT DISTINCT year FROM books WHERE year IS NOT NULL ORDER BY year
